data.title: iAnthus grows presence in FL with new GrowHealthy dispensary in Palm Harbor, boosting their total count to X.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the country's unemployment rate has dropped to a record low of 3.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. The number of new jobs added in the last month alone stands at 250,000, surpassing expectations and contributing to the overall improvement in the labor market. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the last quarter exceeded predictions, coming in at 5.2%, showcasing a strong and stable economy. Experts believe that these positive trends indicate a robust and flourishing job market, providing opportunities for individuals seeking employment.

data.title: Altice USA secures $1 billion loan backed by HFC network assets in partnership with Goldman Sachs and TPG Angelo Gordon.
data.description: Altice USA (NYSE: ATUS) has recently disclosed the initiation and funding of a new $1.0 billion asset-backed term loan facility, known as the Asset Backed Loan Facility. This agreement, facilitated by a subsidiary of Altice USA, was formed in collaboration with investment firms Goldman Sachs and TPG Angelo Gordon. The Loan Facility is backed by specific receivables arising from Altice USA’s activities in the Bronx and Brooklyn service regions, as well as network assets like the Hybrid-Fiber Coaxial (HFC) network.

data.title: Graphjet Technology attended Nasdaq hearing on July 17, 2025 with CEO/CFO Mr. Chris Lai presenting their case.
data.description: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on July 17, 2025, Graphjet Technology (Nasdaq: GTI), known for developing technologies to extract graphite and graphene from agricultural waste, shared that CEO/CFO Mr. Chris Lai appeared before the Hearing Panel on this date. Mr. Lai, alongside the Company’s legal representative, presented Graphjet’s case during the hearing session.

data.title: FOXO Technologies Inc. in Florida declares a 1 for 1.99 reverse stock split of Class A common stock effective from July 27, 2025.
data.description: In West Palm Beach, Florida, on July 17, 2025, FOXO Technologies Inc. (NYSE American: FOXO) announced a 1 for 1.99 reverse stock split of its Class A common stock, par value $0.0001. The Board of Directors approved this action, which is set to take effect at 4:01pm ET on July 27, 2025. Following the reverse split, the Common Stock will commence trading on a split-adjusted basis on the NYSE American under the same symbol “FOXO” starting July 28, 2025. A new CUSIP number will be assigned for trading purposes.

data.title: Uranium Energy Corp (NYSE: UEC) announces results of annual general meeting on July 17, 2025 in Corpus Christi, Texas.
data.description: In Corpus Christi, Texas, on July 17, 2025, Uranium Energy Corp (UEC) shared news on NYSE American about their recent annual general meeting of stockholders. The company, listed as UEC on NYSE American, informed about successful proceedings during the meeting.

data.title: Mustang Energy starts exploration at Surprise Creek Project in Saskatchewan. Acquired 80% interest from Thunderbird Resources Ltd.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on July 17, 2025, Mustang Energy Corp. (CSE: MEC, OTC:MECPF, FRA:92T) has announced the beginning of field exploration at the Surprise Creek Uranium-Copper Project in a mineral-rich area north of the Athabasca Basin. Through an option agreement with Thunderbird Resources Ltd., Mustang has secured an 80% interest in the project. Further information on the agreement can be found in the company's news releases from June 4, 2025, and June 16, 2025, available on the SEDAR+ profile.

data.title: LSL Lessons launched by Hearing First offer step-by-step guidance for families of children with hearing loss.
data.description: In Philadelphia on July 17, 2025, Hearing First, a program under the Oberkotter Foundation, unveiled a new initiative aimed at supporting families of children with hearing loss. The initiative involves providing step-by-step lessons developed by certified Listening and Spoken Language specialists. These lessons are structured to equip families with crucial and research-based information, fostering confidence in caring for children with hearing impairment. This program seeks to empower families by offering valuable knowledge and guidance through expert-designed resources.
